content:
Artificial intelligence (AI)
The Underdog Won.

5 min read
Just now

--

READ THIS HERE FOR FREE :)
Everyone swears the pricey model is smarter. So I gave both the same job and walked out of the room.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by julien Tromeur on UnsplashHere is how basically everyone picks an AI. We look at which one costs more, decide more expensive means smarter, and go with that. I did the exact same thing, right up until I actually tested it.
So this week I ran a tiny experiment. I took the famous, expensive AI that everyone treats like the gold standard, and I put it head to head against a cheap underdog that most people had written off. Same task. Same instructions. And then I did the most important part. I walked out of the room and let them work alone, with nobody there to help.
What I saw genuinely flipped how I think about this. Let me tell you.
The test was simple on purpose
I did not want to measure who sounds smartest. I wanted to see who actually gets the job done when no human is babysitting.
So I gave both of them the same real task from scratch. Build a small thing, test it, then add to it and make sure nothing broke. Nothing fancy. The kind of ordinary work most people…
